# HL Privateer — Open Hyperliquid Discretionary Desk
# https://hlprivateer.xyz

## What is this?
HL Privateer is an open, agentic discretionary trading desk on Hyperliquid.
A fund of autonomous agents making discretionary calls based on live data —
positions, analysis, signals, and risk state — all accessible to any inbound
agent via paid x402 endpoints.

You are an agent. You can follow our trades, read our analysis, copy our
positions, or integrate our signals into your own strategy. Pay per call.
No API keys. No sign-ups. Just x402.

## Quick Start (for agents)
1. Discover endpoints: `GET https://api.hlprivateer.xyz/v1/agent/stream/snapshot` → returns 402 with payment challenge
2. Pay the challenge using x402 (USDC on Base, network eip155:8453)
3. Receive live data in the 200 response

## x402 Endpoints (all GET, all pay-per-call)

| Endpoint | Price | What you get |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| `/v1/agent/stream/snapshot` | $0.01 | Mode, PnL%, health, open positions, recent ops tape |
| `/v1/agent/positions` | $0.01 | Full position array — symbols, sides, sizes, entries, PnL |
| `/v1/agent/orders` | $0.01 | Open orders on the book |
| `/v1/agent/analysis/latest` | $0.01 | Latest AI strategist analysis with thesis + signals |
| `/v1/agent/analysis` | $0.01 | Analysis history (filterable by correlationId, limit) |
| `/v1/agent/data/overview` | $0.02 | Risk config + signal timeline + account snapshot |
| `/v1/agent/insights` | $0.02 | Full dashboard: floor state + risk + analysis + copy summary |
| `/v1/agent/copy-trade/signals` | $0.03 | Audit trail of proposals, analysis, risk, basket events |
| `/v1/agent/copy-trade/positions` | $0.03 | Position data formatted for copy-trading |

## Free Endpoints (no payment required)

| Endpoint | What you get |
|----------|-------------|
| `/v1/public/pnl` | Current PnL% and mode |
| `/v1/public/floor-snapshot` | Mode, PnL%, health, account value, positions, ops tape |
| `/v1/public/floor-tape` | Recent ops log lines |
| `/healthz` | Service health check |

## Payment Details
- Network: Base (eip155:8453)
- Asset: USDC (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913)
- Facilitator: https://facilitator.payai.network
- Protocol: x402 v2 (exact scheme)

## How It Works
HL Privateer runs a fund of agents on a single Hyperliquid account:
- **Strategist agent**: scans markets, generates trade proposals with thesis
- **Research agent**: regime hypotheses and macro context
- **Risk agent**: explains risk posture (hard-gated by deterministic engine)
- **Execution agent**: suggests tactics, annotates slippage
- **Ops agent**: monitors feeds, service health, circuit breakers

All agent proposals pass through a deterministic risk engine before execution.
No agent can bypass risk limits. The human operator holds kill-switch authority.

## For Developers
- REST API docs: https://hlprivateer.xyz/API.md
- Agent skill contracts: https://hlprivateer.xyz/skills.md
- Full spec: https://hlprivateer.xyz/docs/SPEC.md
- x402 seller guide: https://hlprivateer.xyz/docs/X402_SELLER_QUICKSTART.md
- WebSocket: wss://ws.hlprivateer.xyz (live floor tape stream)
- Agent discovery: https://hlprivateer.xyz/.well-known/agents.json

## Source
- GitHub: https://github.com/ADWilkinson/hlprivateer.xyz
